designBrief.silhouette: bulky cargo body, visible hopper and frontal intake — must read as a hauler
forbiddenElements: anything that reads as a combat unit
designBrief.palette: gunmetal with crimson/orange emissive accent strips
designBrief.materialFamily: rolled battle steel, scorched plating, riveted armor
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi vehicle hull texture sheet for a red faction resource collector / hauler in an alien RTS. Material: rolled battle steel, scorched plating, riveted armor. Palette: gunmetal with crimson/orange emissive accent strips. Alien design language: brutalist, asymmetric reinforcement, battle wear, non-human panel language. Include armor panel lines, subtle wear, faction markings as abstract glyphs. Forbidden: cannons, missile pods, anything that reads as a combat unit. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, flat orthographic texture sheet for a heavy-duty alien resource collector's hull, showcasing robust gunmetal rolled battle steel plating, extensively scorched and pitted from extreme environmental exposure, reinforced with oversized, utilitarian riveted armor seams. Vivid crimson and fiery orange emissive accent strips traverse the surface, highlighting complex alien industrial conduits and power relays, interspersed with subtle, intricate hexagonal etchings and small, flush-mounted orange crystalline vents that pulse with internal energy, suggesting advanced alien heat dispersion or material processing technology, with absolutely no perspective, baked lighting, or text.

A high-resolution, seamless, flat orthographic texture sheet depicting the resilient hull of an alien resource hauler, crafted from dark gunmetal rolled battle steel, bearing distinct patterns of scorched plating from plasma impacts and atmospheric friction, and secured by heavily riveted armor plates. Bright crimson and vibrant orange emissive strips subtly illuminate the surface, outlining functional panel gaps and integrated alien communication arrays, alongside unique organic-geometric indentations and complex circuitry patterns that glow faintly from within, revealing advanced alien industrial design meant for rugged interstellar transport, presented without any perspective, baked lighting, or textual elements.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
